compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Synchronized schedule with iControl lighting channel, timer, cycle
compatible_devices.notes: iHub-4AC is an AC-outlet expander; requires iControl 2025 controller to operate; ADlite synchronized control means schedule is synced via iControl; no RJ12 dimming port on iHub-4AC itself; full dimming of lights still requires direct RJ12 to iControl

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer, cycle, environmental trigger (temp/humidity/CO2 via iControl)
compatible_devices.notes: Pure AC outlet expander for iControl; 4 outlets each rated 230V/13A (EU); daisy-chainable up to 40 units; on/off only — no fan speed control; requires iControl 2025 (not compatible with older Controller 43)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer, cycle, environmental trigger (temp/humidity via iControl)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only; no speed control; requires iControl 2025 controller

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Mars Hydro 5L Humidifier, Mars Hydro 15L Humidifier
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer, cycle, humidity trigger via iControl
compatible_devices.notes: On/off based on humidity setpoint from iControl; requires iControl 2025

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer, cycle, humidity trigger via iControl
compatible_devices.notes: On/off based on humidity setpoint from iControl; requires iControl 2025

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer, cycle, temperature trigger via iControl
compatible_devices.notes: On/off via temperature setpoint from iControl; 230V/13A per outlet (EU)

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Mars Hydro CO2 Sensor (optional add-on for iControl)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2-triggered on/off (requires optional CO2 sensor), timer, cycle
compatible_devices.notes: CO2-triggered automation requires optional Mars Hydro CO2 sensor connected to iControl; without CO2 sensor, only timer/cycle control is available; on/off only (no modulation)
